title: ToolAction
description: An action that an AI agent may propose, along with its authority, review, reliance, and payload requirements.

tool_name.description: The tool that executes this action.

action_type.description: The category of action being performed.

default_action.description: Action-level override for the manifest default posture.

authority_required.description: Authority scopes required before this action may be proposed.

review_requirement.description: Review posture required before this action may be executed.

reliance_requirement.description: Reliance evidence requirements for this action.

payload_policy.description: Field-level payload policy for this action's input payload.

redaction_hints.description: Fields to be redacted in exported records for this action.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorising or filtering actions.
